product.name: ArGiyim Denim Kursun CK
product.categorySourceGroup: Cut-proof knit fabric from p-aramid. Bomb and nail proof woven fabrics from Pa6.6
product.specLine: 620 g/m², 50% HPPE 50% Polyester, Abraison Resistant, Double Denim Woven Fabric
descriptions: 50% HPPE (high performance polyethylene) 50% polyester denim double twill fabric for sandblasting suits. The front side of the fabric is polyester which is ultra durable for sun light, the back side of the fabric is double hppe which provides extra abraison resistance for sandblasting clothing.
ArGiyim Denim Kursun CK can be used on abraison resistant cloths.
620 g/m², 50% HPPE 50% Polyester, Abraison Resistant, Double Denim Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 4500N ; Weft > 6500N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 150N ; Weft > 240N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Cut-resistant and abrasion-resistant fabric could theoretically be used in tactical or uniformed gear, but no explicit military or police use is stated.
The product explicitly states EN 17092 motorcyclist certification, directly linking it to motorcycle protective apparel use.
No vehicle or vessel specific use is mentioned; only motorcyclist personal protective norm is cited, which stays under motorcycle.

evidence: ArGiyim Denim Kursun CK can be used on abraison resistant cloths
primary.rationale: The product is explicitly described as a fabric for sandblasting suits, a general industrial protective apparel use with no narrower named sector (like welding or firefighting) dominating, fitting workwear-industrial as the clearest direct application.

secondary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly certified to EN 17092, the motorcyclist protective clothing standard, indicating an independently stated secondary use in motorcycle apparel.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: No explicit military, police or tactical use stated; only cut-resistance and abrasion properties mentioned.
No vehicle or vessel specific use mentioned beyond personal motorcyclist protective norm.
